case_title: ROGEL CARRANZA VS. ROBERT PERALTA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2135 MISSION STREET, #21, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE **$19.00** FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRANZA, ROGEL SERVED MAR-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, ROBERT
